nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Test package initializer ensuring the tests directory is recognized as a Python package.

nodes.name: conftest.py
nodes.summary: Pytest configuration with shared fixtures including in-memory SQLite database setup with foreign key enforcement, FastAPI test client override, and rate limiter disable logic.

nodes.name: test_c2pa_did_vc.py
nodes.summary: C2PA/DID/VC service unit tests covering manifest generation, credential issuance, verification flows, and DID document operations for product authenticity certificates.

nodes.name: test_e2e_workflow.py
nodes.summary: End-to-end workflow tests covering the full creator pipeline: import, notarization, monitoring, IP registration, and monetization through real API endpoints.

nodes.name: test_ip_p24.py
nodes.summary: P2.4 IP Licensing system tests covering license creation, marketplace publishing, licensing terms validation, revenue calculations, and expired license detection.

nodes.name: test_monitor_p23.py
nodes.summary: P2.3 infringement monitoring tests covering Baidu image/text search, batch scanning, result analysis, complaint generation, and monitoring quota management.

nodes.name: test_monitor.py
nodes.summary: Infringement monitoring API tests covering quota retrieval, scan flow, batch scanning, and task listing endpoints.

nodes.name: test_p3_boundary.py
nodes.summary: P3 subscription and commission boundary tests covering subscription tier validation, campaign reward projections, RFQ workflow, sample management, and payment term processing.

nodes.name: test_p3_edge_cases.py
nodes.summary: P3 edge case tests for commission messaging and RFQ workflows including malformed messages, expired deadlines, sample quality reports, and subscription state machine transitions.

nodes.name: test_p3_workflow_integration.py
nodes.summary: P3 workflow integration tests covering full commission project lifecycle from RFQ submission through sample delivery, quality inspection, and contract-based messaging.

nodes.name: test_pdh.py
nodes.summary: Product Development Hub tests covering product templates, mockup generation, listing creation, design specifications, and revenue projection workflows.

nodes.name: test_supply.py
nodes.summary: P2.5 supply chain integration tests covering POD platform publishing, Chinese POD templates, crowdfunding enhancements, license exports, factory price comparison, AI mockup generation, and revenue aggregation.

nodes.name: test_system.py
nodes.summary: System-level integration tests covering the full application lifecycle including authentication, workspace creation, work import, notary services, certificate management, and marketplace operations.

nodes.name: test_works.py
nodes.summary: Works management API tests covering CRUD operations, image import, C2PA manifest generation, notarization workflow, and work listing with filters.

nodes.name: product_fbda3352f75e4305b4ab851e8b7d240a_taobao
nodes.summary: Taobao product certificate export containing header row and one product entry with licensing and verification metadata.

nodes.name: users.json.bak
nodes.summary: Backup of user configuration data containing serialized user preferences and account settings.

nodes.name: oristudio.db
nodes.summary: Primary SQLite database file containing all application data including works, users, products, certificates, and business records.

nodes.name: oristudio.db-shm
nodes.summary: SQLite shared-memory file for WAL-mode database synchronization supporting concurrent read/write access.

nodes.name: oristudio.db-wal
nodes.summary: SQLite write-ahead log containing buffered database writes for concurrent access and crash recovery.

nodes.name: pre_restore_20260612_063437.db
nodes.summary: Pre-restore database snapshot from 2026-06-12 captured before a database migration or repair operation.

nodes.summary: Learning report document on acute abdominal pain and nursing, stored in the workspace asset directory.

nodes.summary: PyInstaller build specification file defining bundle configuration for packaging the OriStudio backend into a standalone executable distribution.

nodes.summary: Docs directory HUD stdin cache for OMC session dashboard, currently empty.
